title: China-to-Gambia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters in Gambia Projects
rows.target_requirement: No standalone TGSB or PURA EMC technical regulation specifically for solar PV inverters has been identified from public sources. The practical EMC baseline for grid-tied, donor-financed, or professionally procured PV inverters should therefore be taken from IEC standards and project specifications: IEC 62920 for EMC requirements and test methods for PV power conversion equipment, plus applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emission tests. TGSB is The Gambia's standards body and has product certification and conformity functions; PURA regulates electricity and renewable-energy activity. Exporters should confirm whether TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, the EPC contractor, or the donor/lender requires IEC EMC test reports for the exact inverter model.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 — Flicker and harmonic limits where applicable by rating
TGSB product certification and conformity context
PURA electricity and renewable-energy regulatory context
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly tied to GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CNAS laboratory reports, and supplier declarations. These reports can demonstrate domestic China performance, but they may not be written to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000 test configuration requested by a Gambian project owner, utility engineer, donor, or lender.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports should be mapped line by line to IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 clauses before relying on them. Where the report does not show IEC method, rating, port configuration, grid voltage, firmware version, cable arrangement, or pass/fail limits, obtain a supplementary IEC EMC report from an accredited laboratory for the exact model or family.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; likely mandatory when required by TGSB conformity review, PURA or NAWEC technical review, EPC specifications, or donor/lender procurement documents
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence supports domestic certification or supplier qualification but is not automatically a Gambia project acceptance document

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] No public Gambia-only solar-inverter EMC rule was confirmed. Use IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports as the conservative evidence package, and confirm with TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, the EPC contractor, and any donor or lender before assuming Chinese GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence is sufficient.

rows.requirement: PURA and NAWEC Grid Connection — Licensing, Utility Acceptance, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
rows.target_requirement: The Gambia does not appear to publish a single solar-inverter grid code equivalent to some larger markets. The practical gate for grid-tied PV is project-specific review by PURA, which regulates electricity and renewable energy, and NAWEC, the national utility responsible for electricity service. PURA's renewable-energy page states that grid-connected and large-scale solar projects create regulatory challenges and that PURA's role in an early grid-connected renewable project included ensuring grid access, completing a power-purchase agreement, and recommending a licence. For PV inverters, exporters should expect IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, project-specific protection settings, and validation for The Gambia's 50 Hz 230/400 V low-voltage conditions. Where a donor, lender, EPC contractor, or NAWEC specifies a different grid-code profile, that project specification controls.
target_standards: PURA renewable-energy oversight and electricity regulation context
NAWEC project-specific grid-connection and utility acceptance practice
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 / local utility practice — 50 Hz 230/400 V low-voltage settings to be confirmed project by project
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power stations connected to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding results. These documents are based on Chinese utility conditions, including 50 Hz 220/380 V settings under GB/T 156, and do not by themselves establish PURA licensing acceptance or NAWEC grid-connection acceptance in The Gambia.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid documents do not transfer automatically to The Gambia. Prepare a project dossier that includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, inverter protection-setting tables for 50 Hz 230/400 V operation, firmware configuration control, commissioning test procedures, and any NAWEC or PURA forms requested for the project. Treat donor or lender specifications as additional gates for large-scale or concessional-finance projects.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects through PURA licensing or regulatory review and NAWEC utility connection acceptance; exact evidence list is project-specific and should be confirmed before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese project requirements but is not a substitute for PURA licensing, NAWEC connection acceptance, or donor/lender technical specifications

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat PURA licensing or regulatory review and NAWEC grid-connection acceptance as separate Gambia project gates. Chinese GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62116, IEC 61727, 50 Hz 230/400 V settings validation, commissioning evidence, and any donor or lender requirements before a grid-tied PV inverter is committed to shipment.

source.publisher: Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA), The Gambia

rows.requirement: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar — IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, Donor Procurement, and Humidity/Dust Derating
rows.target_requirement: The Gambia has substantial off-grid, mini-grid, and donor-supported solar activity, including regional off-grid programmes. For solar home systems, mini-grids, water-pumping PV, and donor-financed rural electrification, the practical technical baseline may be IEC TS 62257 for rural electrification systems, VeraSol or Lighting Global quality assurance for off-grid products where specified, and project-owner procurement specifications. These routes are not necessarily NAWEC grid-connection approvals, but they can be mandatory procurement gates. Inverter selection should address high humidity, coastal corrosion, dust, enclosure rating, thermal derating, surge protection, maintainability, spare parts, and local installer competence.
target_standards: IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification
VeraSol / Lighting Global quality-assurance requirements where specified by procurement documents
Project-owner, donor, lender, or EPC procurement specifications
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese off-grid inverter suppliers often provide domestic test reports, GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 documentation for grid-connected models, factory QA certificates, IP-rating claims, and environmental test summaries. These documents may help technical due diligence, but they do not automatically satisfy IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, donor-procurement, or project-owner acceptance requirements for Gambian off-grid or mini-grid deployments.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Factory environmental and IP-rating test reports, where available
rows.gap: Gap: Domestic China documentation often does not address the exact off-grid procurement profile used in The Gambia. For off-grid or mini-grid supply, map each inverter model to the purchaser's technical specification, IEC TS 62257 clauses where applicable, VeraSol or Lighting Global status where required, tropical-environment derating, surge and lightning protection, battery compatibility, service documentation, and spare-parts commitments.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory when included in donor, lender, PURA, government, EPC, or purchaser specifications for off-grid or mini-grid solar
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese factory and domestic standard evidence may support due diligence but is not automatically accepted for Gambia off-grid procurement

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] For Gambian off-grid or mini-grid projects, do not assume a China domestic inverter certificate is enough. Check the purchaser's IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, donor, lender, humidity, dust, surge-protection, and service-support requirements before shipment, especially for rural electrification and water-pumping PV projects.

source.publisher: Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA), The Gambia

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — TGSB Conformity, PURA/NAWEC Projects, and Donor Procurement
rows.target_requirement: The conservative safety baseline for PV inverters supplied into The Gambia is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or model family. TGSB is The Gambia's national standards body, established by the TGSB Act, and its public materials describe powers related to standards marks, inspection, and conformity. PURA regulates electricity and renewable energy, while NAWEC is the practical utility counterparty for grid-connected projects. Public sources do not confirm a single Gambia solar-inverter mandatory standard list, so exporters should treat IEC 62109-1/-2, product labelling, installation instructions, environmental ratings, and project-owner safety specifications as baseline evidence until TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, or the procuring entity confirms the exact route.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
TGSB Act and TGSB standards-mark, inspection, and conformity context
PURA electricity and renewable-energy regulation context
NAWEC utility connection and project acceptance context
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter suppliers commonly provide GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, factory quality documents, and domestic installation manuals. These documents may overlap conceptually with IEC 62109 safety topics, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports unless the report explicitly covers IEC 62109 clauses, model variants, ratings, environmental category, and critical components.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification routes where available
rows.gap: Gap: A China domestic safety or performance certificate does not prove that the product meets IEC 62109-1/-2 for a Gambia project. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 reports, certificate schedules, critical-component lists, English manuals, warning labels, installation clearances, IP and corrosion evidence, surge-protection design, thermal derating curves, and service instructions. For coastal or high-humidity sites, confirm conformal coating, enclosure materials, connector ratings, and warranty assumptions.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but conservative baseline for TGSB conformity review, PURA/NAWEC grid projects, utility-scale procurement, and donor/lender specifications; exact mandatory status should be confirmed with the responsible body
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-dependent for many Chinese PV inverter certificates; not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Gambia

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence as the baseline safety package for Gambia PV inverter projects, then confirm the exact route with TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, and the project owner. Do not treat GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC, CGC, or CNAS domestic documentation as automatically equivalent unless the report explicitly covers the IEC 62109 model family and ratings.
